expectations.text: Uses force create element_like spring_damper (not single_component_force, bushing, or beam)
expectations.evidence: The response uses 'force create element spring_damper_bushing' — a hallucinated command that appends 'bushing' to the element type. The correct element type is 'spring_damper'. The assertion explicitly excludes 'bushing', and this command does not match the expected element type.

expectations.text: The stiffness parameter is set to 5000
expectations.evidence: stiffness = 5000.0 is present in the force create command.

expectations.text: The damping parameter is set to 100
expectations.evidence: damping = 100.0 is present in the force create command.

expectations.text: The length parameter (free length) is set to 250
expectations.evidence: free_length = 250.0 is present in the force create command.
i_marker_name = .MODEL.PART_1.SPRING_MAR_I and j_marker_name = .MODEL.PART_2.SPRING_MAR_J are both present in the command.

expectations.text: Explains or implies that spring_damper acts along the line joining the two markers
expectations.evidence: The overview states 'Adams computes the spring and damping forces along the line joining those two markers.' The notes also confirm 'Adams always acts along the I-to-J line.'
